en.title: Causal Optimizer Interaction Calculus: Hidden Geometric Relaxation and Identifiable Interventions
en.short: A causal and statistical calculus for optimizer interactions, from hidden relaxation to identifiable experiments.
en.abstract: Optimizer experiments reveal responses to configurations without uniquely revealing their mechanisms. This paper separates pathwise realization, Möbius decomposition, and experimental identification. It gives exact identifiability and quotient stability, transfers hidden-relaxation interactions to observable readouts, and validates the theory with controlled logistic-model and neural-trace experiments.

zh.title: 因果优化器交互微积分：隐几何松弛与可识别干预
zh.short: 从隐状态松弛到可识别实验的一套优化器交互因果与统计微积分。
zh.abstract: 优化器实验可以观测配置响应，却未必唯一揭示其内部机制。本文区分路径实现、Möbius 分解和实验识别，给出精确可识别性与商空间稳定性，将隐松弛的交互传递到可观测读出，并以逻辑回归和神经轨迹实验验证理论。
